falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if Canada's foreign-born tertiary-attainment share exceeds the OECD destination median (excl AUS, NZL) by at least 10 pp on average 2000-2023, AND points-system country fixed-effect coefficient on foreign-born tertiary share is positive and significant at p<0.05. REFUTED if Canadian premium is < 5 pp or coefficient is insignificant.
